title: bathmium macrophyllum
side_effects: Bathmium macrophyllum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea and dizziness, as well as causing stomach irritation and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts has also been linked to kidney damage and liver strain. In extreme cases, misuse of the plant can lead to seizures, respiratory distress, and even coma. Additionally, Bathmium macrophyllum may interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions and necessitating careful medical supervision.
